subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto thee. Verily, it is a glad-tiding from the All-Merciful unto thee and unto the peoples of all the worlds. Take it with the hand [3.5s]... ...The remembrance of God and His praise, and the glory of God and His splendor, rest upon Thee, O Thou Who art His Beauty!
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الیک انه لبشاره من لدی الرحمن علیک و علی اهل الاکوان خذه بید
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @Manifestation of God as sun
